## Tests

<!-- Did you write the test first? Which tests cover this change? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits in commit messages
- [ ] No `any` types added (or justified in the description)
- [ ] UI strings in English
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths committed
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
- [ ] Linked the issue this closes (`Closes #123`)
